isolation.testingPattern: httptest.NewRecorder (no shared state, no real server)

assertions.title: Full agent workflow with consistent envelope

steps.expected: All handler tests pass and return consistent {success, data, error, meta} envelope format
steps.observed: All 14 handler test cases passed. Server responses use respondWithEnvelope/respondWithSuccess/respondWithError which all produce {success, data/error, meta} envelope structure.

steps.expected: All response helpers produce {success, data, error, meta} shape
steps.observed: respondWithEnvelope produces {success:true, data, meta:{command, mode}}. respondWithError produces {success:false, error:{code, message, details?}, meta:{command, mode}}. respondWithSuccess produces {success:true, data, meta:{command, mode}}. All use identical envelope shape.

steps.action: Verify full server test suite passes
steps.observed: All 78+ server tests PASS (0.912s). Covers health, login, courses, lectures, jobs CRUD, idempotency keys, persistence, WebSocket auth, cache, etc.

evidence.network: N/A - httptest.NewRecorder pattern, no real HTTP server
evidence.testOutput: TestHealthHandler PASS, TestLoginHandler PASS, TestListJobsHandler PASS, TestGetJobHandlerSuccess PASS, TestCreateJobHandlerValidation (6 subtests) PASS, TestLecturesHandlerValidation (4 subtests) PASS

assertions.title: Agent error recovery with retryable hints

steps.expected: COURSES_FETCH_FAILED returns 502 with retryable:true, retryAfter:N. Retry works.
steps.observed: TestRespondWithErrorRetryHintForUpstreamErrors passes with 4 subtests: LOGIN_FAILED is retryable, COURSES_FETCH_FAILED is retryable, LECTURES_FETCH_FAILED is retryable, CANCEL_FAILED is retryable.

steps.expected: retryHint has Retryable bool and RetryAfter int fields
steps.observed: auth.go:94-97 defines retryHint struct{Retryable bool, RetryAfter int}. Used in courses handler (line 834, 840), lectures handler (line 875, 881), cancel handler (line 982).

steps.action: Verify non-retryable errors don't have retry hints
steps.observed: TestRespondWithErrorNoRetryHintForClientErrors passes with 9 subtests confirming INVALID_REQUEST, MISSING_PARAMETER, INVALID_JOB_CONFIG, JOB_CANNOT_CANCEL, AUTH_FAILED, MISSING_TOKEN, INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT, INVALID_TOKEN, JOB_NOT_FOUND are all NOT retryable.

steps.expected: All CLI tests pass, including JSON envelope tests for all subcommands
steps.observed: All 37+ CLI tests PASS (0.003s). Includes TestExecuteJSONNoSubcommandReturnsCapabilitiesEnvelope, TestExecuteJSONEnvelopeShapeForVersionAndErrors (3 subtests), TestExecuteJSONServeReturnsDeterministicMetadata, TestExecuteJSONValidationAndDownloadEnvelope, TestExecuteJSONDownloadUsesStructuredResult.

steps.expected: CLI uses {success, data, error, meta} envelope matching server format
steps.observed: cli.go:32-47 defines jsonEnvelope{Success bool, Data any, Error *jsonErr, Meta jsonMeta{Command, Mode}}. Consistent with server envelope shape.

steps.action: Verify go build ./... and go vet ./... pass
steps.observed: go build ./... completed successfully (exit code 0). go vet ./... completed successfully (exit code 0). No issues.

evidence.testOutput: All CLI tests PASS. go build and go vet pass cleanly.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. VAL-CROSS-001: Full server handler test suite (78+ tests) passes, all handlers produce consistent {success, data, error, meta} envelope. VAL-CROSS-002: Retry hint tests confirm COURSES_FETCH_FAILED (502) returns retryable=true with retryAfter, and client errors are properly non-retryable. VAL-CROSS-005: All 37+ CLI tests pass with JSON envelope format intact, go build and go vet clean.
